raw_consumer_statement: A XXXX Credit Card was opened in my name, which was even spelled wrong, spelled as XXXX XXXX, and a travel itinerary was booked for airline travel for someone else, they will not tell me ANY info. I first found out when the credit card arrived in the mail. I called XXXX to find out what happened and decline the charges and close the account. The charges were for airline travel for {$1700.00}. They declined to assist me saying I benefited from the charges. They wouldn't even provide me the credit card number to give to the police. The travel itinerary is in someone else 's name. I have filed a police report with my local municipality, XXXX OH the report number is # XXXX. I am now filing this complaint in hopes of resolving this issue.
